import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"List your favorited posts"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/favorites"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Across all your groups, newest-favorited first, cursor-paginated.
Favorites on posts in groups you've since left are hidden.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
